raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I noticed a pending charge for the full {$15000.00} balance transfer amount even though I have autopay set up. I called customer service that same day and was told they would reverse the full charge once it posted. I called again on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX they told me the refund was approved on XX/XX/XXXX and payment was on its way. However, when I called on XX/XX/XXXX, the representative said they would send me a letter after a two-week review and only then decide if I would get my money back. It has now been almost a month with no refund.
